description: Multi-card grid cheat sheet — one image, N section cards, each with a colored header and items list. Best for API references, language syntax, command references, and learning roadmaps.

hero.description: Main title 2-4 words ALL CAPS — the subject (JAVA STREAMS, GIT COMMANDS, PYTHON TIPS)

subtitle.description: One line — what this covers and the target audience

sections.description: Section cards arranged in a 3-column grid. 6-9 sections fills the image well. Each section is one card.

items.name: string — section header label (Stream Creation, Intermediate Ops, Terminal Ops)

items.description: Items inside this card. Each item: name (the method/term/command) + desc (one short line).

footer_note.description: Short bottom-line insight or version note (Java 8+ — use streams for clean data pipelines)
